Do not edit this file directly. -->  # VER-QUIC-CRT-0002 - QUIC Connection Runtime Deadline Scheduling Verification  ## Scope  This slice covers deadline scheduling and the timer-effect plumbing around the runtime. It does not prove the RFC 9000 idle-timeout value derivation or any future close/drain policy math beyond the scheduling seam.  ## Requirements Verified  - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0045 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0047 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0048 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0049 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0052 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0053 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0054 - REQ-QUIC-CRT-0057  ## Verification Method  Focused unit tests and inspection evidence from the shard-owned deadline scheduler and runtime timer helpers.  ## Preconditions  - The Incursa.Quic solution builds successfully. - The CRT requirement traits are discoverable by the test runner. - The deadline scheduler remains shard-owned and the runtime timer helpers remain internal to the repository.  ## Procedure or Approach  - Run the CRT requirement-home tests that cover timer ordering, deterministic tie-breaking, stale-generation suppression, and runtime timer expiry handling. - Confirm the scheduler's stale-registration checks reject older generations after a rearm or cancellation. - Confirm timer effects continue to use monotonic due ticks and the runtime accepts only matching-generation expirations.  ## Expected Result  The scheduler dequeues earlier due ticks first, breaks equal due ticks deterministically, ignores stale generations after a rearm, and the runtime exposes generation-aware arm and cancel effects while treating stale expirations as a no-op.  ## Evidence  - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0048.cs - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0049.cs - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0052.cs - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0053.cs - tests/Incursa.Quic.Tests/RequirementHomes/CRT/REQ-QUIC-CRT-0035.cs - src/Incursa.Quic/QuicConnectionRuntime.cs - src/Incursa.Quic/QuicConnectionRuntimeDeadlineScheduler.cs  ## Status  planned  ## Related Artifacts  - SPEC-QUIC-CRT - ARC-QUIC-CRT-0002 - WI-QUIC-CRT-0002
